Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only ‚Äî it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.

Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 ‚Üí 4.6, 4.6 ‚Üí 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.

Saya sudah punya akses ke konteks lengkap project ini lewat skill yang tersedia (arsitektur, database, konvensi kode, dll), jadi siap bantu kapan saja.

Ada yang mau dikerjakan hari ini? Misalnya:

Tinggal bilang aja mau ngerjain apa, nanti saya sesuaikan. üöÄ

content.text:
Sudah saya cek. Berikut jawabannya:

## Status memori sekarang: **kosong** üóÇÔ∏è

Folder memori-nya **ada** (`C:\Users\Lenovo\.claude\projects\d--Arumed-PrimaVision\memory\`) tapi **isinya kosong** ‚Äî belum ada `MEMORY.md` maupun file fakta apa pun. Jadi saat ini saya **belum menyimpan memori** apa-apa tentang project PrimaVision ini.

Penting untuk dipahami soal cara kerja memori saya:

- Memori itu **per-folder project**. Karena PrimaVision ini folder terpisah dari Cilegon, **memori dari project Cilegon tidak ikut terbawa** ke sini. Keduanya punya direktori memori sendiri-sendiri.
- Jadi walaupun kode-nya duplikasi, "ingatan" saya tentang hasil test pra go-live yang kamu lakukan di Cilegon **tidak otomatis ada** di sesi PrimaVision ini.

## Yang kamu sebut tadi ‚Äî penting & layak disimpan

Konteks ini bagus untuk dicatat supaya konsisten di sesi-sesi berikutnya:

1. **PrimaVision = duplikasi dari Arumed Klinik Mata Cilegon**, di-rebrand jadi RS Mata Prima Vision (Medan), tema biru.
2. Kamu **sudah melakukan test pra go-live** di project Cilegon.

Sebelum saya simpan, saya mau pastikan dulu beberapa hal supaya catatannya akurat dan berguna ‚Äî bukan asal nyatat:

questions.question: Soal hasil test pra go-live di Cilegon ‚Äî apa yang penting saya catat untuk diterapkan di PrimaVision?

options.label: Semua lulus, aman
options.description: Test pra go-live Cilegon sudah lulus semua; PrimaVision tinggal ikut karena kodenya sama.

options.label: Ada bug yang sudah difix
options.description: Ada temuan/bug saat test yang sudah diperbaiki ‚Äî perlu dipastikan fix-nya juga ada di PrimaVision.

options.label: Masih ada yang pending
options.description: Masih ada item yang belum selesai / perlu ditindaklanjuti di PrimaVision.

options.label: Nanti saya ceritakan
options.description: Belum perlu dicatat sekarang; saya akan jelaskan detailnya nanti.

questions.question: Apa yang mau saya simpan ke memori PrimaVision sekarang?

options.label: Catat konteks dasar dulu (Recommended)
options.description: Simpan fakta: PrimaVision duplikasi dari Cilegon (rebrand Medan, tema biru) + status sudah pra go-live. Detail menyusul.

options.label: Catat lengkap dengan detail test
options.description: Saya akan tanya/kumpulkan detail temuan test dulu, baru simpan semuanya sekaligus.

options.label: Jangan simpan dulu
options.description: Belum usah menyimpan apa pun ke memori untuk sekarang.

content.text:
Ternyata **memori-nya LENGKAP**, bukan kosong. üéâ

Saya minta maaf ‚Äî pengecekan saya sebelumnya keliru (perintah `bash` saya error karena quoting, dan beberapa tool call kepotong). Setelah dicek ulang dengan benar:

## Memori PrimaVision: **62 file tersimpan** ‚úÖ

Folder memori berisi **61 file fakta + MEMORY.md** (index). Ini "ingatan" lengkap saya tentang project ini.

Yang relevan dengan yang kamu sebut tadi:

### 1. Konteks duplikasi ‚Äî **sudah tercatat**
[project_instance_arumed_primavision.md](C:\Users\Lenovo\.claude\projects\d--Arumed-PrimaVision\memory\project_instance_arumed_primavision.md):
> Duplikat di `D:\Arumed-PrimaVision`, RS Mata Prima Vision Medan (RSKMPV), tema biru, DB `dbprimavision`/pw `arumed`.

### 2. Test pra go-live ‚Äî **sudah tercatat detail**
[project_pre_golive_bug_audit.md](C:\Users\Lenovo\.claude\projects\d--Arumed-PrimaVision\memory\project_pre_golive_bug_audit.md) (10.7 KB):
> Audit E2E 2026-05-29: **9 bug ditemukan & SEMUA DIPERBAIKI**. #1-6 (asuransi 500/route ordering/consent gzip/dll), #7 dispensing‚Üíinventory FEFO, #8 zombie row 7 stasiun, #9 prescription dose/frequency hilang. + smoke test (`composer smoke` 35/35) + `BedahDemoSeeder`. Inti sistem sehat.

### Cakupan memori lainnya
- **30+ fitur**: admisi, perawat, refraksionis, dokter, penunjang, bedah, farmasi, kasir, inventori, asuransi/TPA, form registry, rujukan, dll.
- **Integrasi**: VClaim (LIVE production 2026-05-30), Satu Sehat, BPJS Antrean.
- **15+ feedback/gotcha**: Vue 3.5 quirks, print A4, timezone WIB, styling visibility, SSL Windows, dll.

‚öÝÔ∏è Satu catatan: ada warning **MEMORY.md sudah 28.9 KB (limit ~24.4 KB)** ‚Äî index-nya kepanjangan, jadi tadi cuma sebagian yang ke-load. Kalau mau, nanti bisa saya rapikan (pindahkan detail dari baris index ke file topik masing-masing) supaya selalu ke-load penuh.

Jadi: **memori utuh, tidak hilang**. Mau lanjut kerjakan sesuatu, atau saya rapikan dulu MEMORY.md yang kepanjangan itu?
Saya baca dulu MEMORY.md lengkap untuk lihat baris mana yang kepanjangan.

# Memory Index

- [Instance: Arumed-PrimaVision](project_instance_arumed_primavision.md) ‚Äî duplikat di `D:\Arumed-PrimaVision`, RS Mata Prima Vision Medan (RSKMPV), tema biru, DB `dbprimavision`/pw `arumed`.
- [BUG: DoctorScheduleSeeder week_start](bug_doctorscheduleseeder_week_start.md) ‚Äî seed DB bersih baru gagal (week_start NOT NULL tak diisi); fixed di clone PrimaVision, belum di master.

- [Arumed Project](project_arumed.md) ‚Äî Vue 3.5 + Laravel 13.8 HIS oftalmologi, status modul, pola wajib (skill, envelope, RBAC)
- [Nakes Profile (NIP/SIP/STR) di Data Pengguna](feature_nakes_profile_data_pengguna.md) ‚Äî 2026-05-30 gap ditutup: input NIP/SIP/STR di modal user (role nakes klinis), `UserService::syncEmployeeProfile` tulis ke employees + auto-buat employee bila perlu. CSV pengguna sip/str belum.
- [PRE-GO-LIVE BUG AUDIT](project_pre_golive_bug_audit.md) ‚Äî Audit E2E 2026-05-29: **9 bug ditemukan & SEMUA DIPERBAIKI** (branch `fix/pre-golive-500-bugs`, belum merge main). #1-6 (asuransi 500/route ordering/consent gzip/dll), #7 dispensing‚Üíinventory_stocks FEFO, #8 zombie row 7 stasiun, #9 prescription dose/frequency hilang. + smoke test (`composer smoke` 35/35) + `BedahDemoSeeder` (demo bedah/farmasi/kasir/TTD). Inti sistem sehat. Pakai curl bukan PowerShell utk test auth.
- [Realtime Antrean (WebSocket/Reverb)](feature_realtime_antrean.md) ‚Äî WS Reverb DISIAPKAN 2026-05-30 (install+config publish) tapi belum aktif (`BROADCAST=log`); antrean jalan polling **8s seragam** (dulu 30s). Channel public, broadcast sudah di QueueService. Aktivasi produksi = isi `.env` + `reverb:start`. Panduan `Docs/REALTIME-ANTREAN-WEBSOCKET.md`.
- [Master Data Stage 1+2 (post-rev)](feature_master_data_stage1.md) ‚Äî Stage 1: 8 resource. Rev 2026-05-26 malam: Tarif Tindakan pindah ke Tarif&Paket, Obat/BHP/IOL pindah ke Inventori Farmasi. Master Data sekarang: Profil/ICD-10/ICD-9/Wilayah. Procedures schema baru (code autogen TND-001 per kategori).
- [Tarif & Paket Bedah](feature_tarif_paket_bedah.md) ‚Äî 3 section: Tarif Tindakan + Metode Bayar (insurers TPA parent/child inheritance + tarif tindakan per-insurer) + Paket Bedah. Container max-width 1600px. CSV tanpa kode (lookup by nama+kategori). **+CSV Import/Export Paket Bedah (long format, 4 item_type, replace komposisi, tarif jual tidak ikut) 2026-05-29.**
- [Inventori Farmasi](feature_inventori_farmasi.md) ‚Äî modul standalone Obat/BHP/IOL/**Alat Medis** di /inventori-farmasi/*, permission `inventori_farmasi.*`, view fisik tetap di views/master-data/ (router reroute). Master sekarang TANPA harga/stok (Obat: + satuan besar/kecil/konversi; BHP: kode auto-gen BHP-NNN + 4 kategori tertutup; IOL: tanpa stok/harga; **Alat Medis: master aset reusable, code auto-gen MEQ-NNN, tarif flat per insurer**). Harga di sub-menu Penentuan Harga.
- [Master CSV Pipeline](feature_master_csv_pipeline.md) ‚Äî pipeline generic template/export/import CSV master (MasterDataService + CSV_TYPES + REGISTRY). Cara nambah resource (5 langkah), exclude `code` auto-gen, by-name vs uniqueKey upsert, petunjuk "#" di template. **Audit besar 2026-05-30**: fix bug IOL import (kunci serial‚Üíbrand+model+power), empty-stock crash (`castCsvCell`), rules tindakan (harga‚â•0/kategori case-insensitive/status), **tarif & paket bedah** (export skip master soft-deleted + notes "#" + csvDataLines), **CSV per-paket di halaman detail Paket Bedah** (template terisi). Validasi enum category obat/bhp saat import MASIH belum.
- [Inventori ‚Äî Penentuan Harga (HPP & HJA)](feature_inventori_harga.md) ‚Äî sub-menu /inventori-farmasi/harga. Tabel `inventory_prices` + setting global `ppn_rate`. Formula: HJA = HPP √ó (1+margin%) √ó (PPN?). Recompute auto saat ppn_rate diubah.
- [Pembelian & Penerimaan](feature_pembelian_penerimaan.md) ‚Äî sub-menu Supplier/Pembelian(PO)/Penerimaan(GRN) di /inventori-farmasi/*. 6 tabel baru, stok per-batch+expiry, status PO auto dari GRN, validasi over-receive. RBAC: 3 modul baru (supplier/pembelian/penerimaan). HPP tetap manual (tidak auto). **+Cetak PO A4 (Teleport+window.print, kop+logo) dgn blok TTD: Pemohon = e-sign teks ringan (badge "‚úì ditandatangani elektronik" + created_at¬∑po_number, BUKAN canvas), Direktur = TTD basah kosong dari Profil Klinik. 2026-05-29.**
- [Anjungan Kiosk](feature_anjungan_kiosk.md) ‚Äî UMUM wired, BPJS disabled (menunggu client ID VClaim, mockDB sudah dihapus total). Heartbeat /up + envelope guard. **Thermal print 80mm fix 2026-05-29: Teleport #print-ticket ke body + @media print unscoped (#app display:none, reset base.css min-width/height, @page 72mm) ‚Äî dulu blank.**
- [Admisi View](feature_admisi_view.md) ‚Äî cleanup 2026-05-26: buang familyPhone/company/sosial/diagnosis (backend tidak simpan), wire wilayah ‚Üí WilayahPicker emsifa, print thermal antrean. **+2026-05-28: stat cards per-penjamin = invoice PAID, card Umum (7 card 1-baris). +2026-05-29: tgl lahir DD/MM/YYYY di konfirmasi, SOSIAL‚Üítarif (sudah jalan), COB WIRED (visit_cob, penjamin2 selalu ASURANSI, hanya utk penjamin utama ASURANSI/PERUSAHAAN; billing tetap penjamin utama, split plafon masih placeholder).**
- [Visit Active Guard + UI Visibility](feature_visit_active_guard.md) ‚Äî 2026-05-30: antrian difilter HARIAN (`whereDate today`) ‚Üí visit lintas-hari belum-selesai "hilang" tapi sebenarnya nyangkut (47 visit aktif lintas-hari). `visits` TANPA kolom status (pakai `current_station`). **Guard `registerVisit`**: pasien tak boleh >1 visit aktif ‚Üí TOLAK 422 (kiosk/rujukan-internal dikecualikan). **+UI**: cariPasien sertakan `active_visit` ‚Üí badge+banner merah saat cari pasien; filter "Belum Selesai (semua tgl)" (`unfinished`) di Daftar Kunjungan + cancel per-baris. Belum ada auto-cleanup/carry-over visit basi.
- [Perawat View](feature_perawat_view.md) ‚Äî cleanup 2026-05-26: fix endpoint /mulai, gabung 4 tab jadi 1 card, relax panggil gate, validation TD+KGD+keluhan wajib. **+CPPT timeline**: tabel `nurse_cppt_entries` (1:N per visit, append+soft-edit), endpoint `/perawat/cppt/*`, tombol Update Asesmen + card CPPT/SOAP. **Bugfix lanjutan**: hapus early-return COMPLETED di pickPatient, action-row jadi 3 v-if independen (bukan rantai v-else-if), finalize gate service-level relax (cuma TD+KGD+keluhan).
- [Refraksionis View](feature_refraksionis_view.md) ‚Äî revisi 2026-05-26: wire skipPt ‚Üí endpoint `/refraksi/antrian/{id}/lewati`, payload lengkap (keratometri+kacamata lama+ADD+prescription), prefill dari record existing, saveStep persist ke backend, pemeriksaanLoading jadi `:disabled` (bukan v-if), filter sekunder gabung "Umum & Asuransi", button-press feedback tier 3 (hover‚Üíactive‚Üípending lock).
- [Dokter Demo Seeder](feature_dokter_demo_seeder.md) ‚Äî `DokterDemoSeeder` (run manual): 3 pasien UMUM/BPJS/ASURANSI per dokter on-duty hari ini + 2 kunjungan lama finalized (riwayat SOAP). Wajib set visit.doctor_schedule_id; gotcha NIK+bpjs_number UNIQUE; visus pakai RefractionRecord.
- [DokterView Module](dokterview-module.md) ‚Äî SOAP Tab 4 auto-sync via `watch` (S‚Üêanamnese, O‚ÜêobjectiveText incl. KGD, P‚ÜêrxList) menimpa edit manual. By design: `doFinalize()` cuma advance queue, Tab 2/4 tidak persist. Hardcoded: `DOCTOR_PIN='1234'` + `icd10DB`/`icd9DB` array statis. Tindakan/e-resep autosave 600ms. Tarif Tab 3 lookup via [[kasir-getprice-resolve]]. **+ Queue card sync PerawatView + button-press tier-3 + order penunjang staging lokal (2026-05-28 malam).** **+Tab 4 Bedah: jam bedah OPSIONAL (dropdown slot 30mnt, tandai bentrok) + preview jumlah pasien bedah per tanggal via endpoint baru `/dokter/bedah/slot` (2026-05-29).** **+2026-05-30 sore: Form Registry pindah ke MODAL (showFormDocsModal) + tombol launcher "Dokumen RM" di patient bar (.dbtns, semua tab); isi modal = komponen baru `FormDocsBrowser` (daftar terpadu 3 section via 3 fetch paralel + search + filter status todo/draft/final, item reuse FormRMRenderer); sifat dokumen per-template (OUTPUT/INPUT/HYBRID, TTD wajib hanya jika field required) lihat [[feature-form-registry]]. +Topbar identitas dokter (hanya akun dokter, nama+SIP hitam dari Data Pengguna).**
- [Flow Penunjang ‚Üî Dokter](flow_penunjang_dokter.md) ‚Äî status DI_PENUNJANG (turun) vs SELESAI_PENUNJANG (naik ke atas), `requeueToDokter` reuse baris (anti-duplikat), dua trigger (finalize per-test vs tombol "Selesai & Kembalikan"), order baru staging lokal sampai konfirmasi.
- [KasirService::getPrice](kasir_getprice_resolve.md) ‚Äî sentral tariff resolver per insurer (procedure/medication/bhp/iol/**equipment**) post `classification` drop. TPA-aware via `Insurer::tariffInsurerId()`, fallback ke insurer sistem dari guarantor_type. Fix 2026-05-28: sebelumnya silent return 0 karena masih query kolom yang sudah di-drop. **+2026-05-29: dispatch `'equipment'` ‚Üí `medical_equipment_tariffs`. Pattern Rp 0 / is_active=false untuk BPJS skip otomatis.**
- [Billing Items Expansion](feature_billing_items_expansion.md) ‚Äî 2026-05-29: BHP loop fix di consolidateBilling (sebelumnya hilang), 4 kategori BHP tertutup (CSSD/INSTRUMENT_SET/MEDICAL_SUPPLIES/MEDICAL_BHP), Medical Equipment baru (microscope/Phaco/biometri) dgn flat usage fee per insurer. Forward-only. BPJS skip via Rp 0/inactive.
- [Bedah Terjadwal View](feature_bedah_terjadwal_view.md) ‚Äî `/bedah/terjadwal` 2 tab. Tab1 Pasien Terjadwal: tabel+weekpicker(`date_from/to`/`upcoming`)+kolom IOL biometri (dari `visit.iol_recommendations`). Tab2 Request: tabel 3-sumber (surgery_request+unit_request+unit_return station=BEDAH) + aksi per-baris Terima/Retur + sub-tab Berjalan/Riwayat. Tombol request dari paket ‚Üí **unit-request Inventori Farmasi** (bukan surgery-request). Pasien via `visits.surgery_schedule_id` (surgery_schedules TANPA kolom pasien). Gotcha: master list pakai `unwrapList()` (paginator), RBAC `dokter`+`request_unit`, deliver butuh inventory_stock (admin). +fix TDZ BedahView `leftMode`.
- [Bedah View](feature_bedah_view.md) ‚Äî wire `/bedah/antrian` 2026-05-29 (panggil + selesai ‚Üí KASIR), polling 15s, badge PREOP. Action operasi detail (checklist/BHP/Tim/laporan) masih default kosong (out-of-scope). Ruang OK dynamic dari Profil Klinik. **+2026-05-29 malam: 2 section live di tab Intraoperatif ‚Äî Pemakaian BHP (used_qty editable per request RECEIVED) + Pemakaian Alat Medis (dropdown master + log). Lihat [[billing-items-expansion]].** **+jam-bedah-opsional sync 2026-05-29: jam dari dokter bisa null ‚Üí kartu/panel/detail tampil "Jam belum diatur/Belum dijam" (amber); pakai `/bedah/jadwal` (berat), bukan `/dokter/bedah/slot`. Lihat [[dokterview-module]].**
- [Kasir View](feature_kasir_view.md) ‚Äî revamp 2026-05-29: kartu antrean PerawatView-style + button-press tier-3, endpoint `/kasir/antrian/{id}/lewati`, kolom Kategori dari `procedures.category`, diskon flex (Rp/% per-item dan global) via kolom baru `discount_amount/discount_percent/net_price` di billing_items + `discount_percent` di billing_invoices, fix cetak rincian via Teleport + style block global. **+2026-05-29 malam: itemTypes & pill warna ditambah `MEDICAL_EQUIPMENT` (biru). +2026-05-29 lanjut**: `consolidateBilling` di-refactor jadi 7 builder method, **Penunjang** masuk invoice (tabel `diagnostic_test_type_tariffs` + getPrice arm `diagnostic_test`; `diagnostic_orders.test_type` simpan code bukan FK), **master Kategori Tagihan** (`billing_categories` + seeder 10 default + UI `/tarif-paket/kategori-tagihan` di section Pengaturan + datalist autocomplete + grouping `<tbody>` per kategori di tabel kasir & print sesuai sort_order; kategori tak terdaftar ‚Üí bucket "Lainnya" di akhir), **routing fix** `processPayment` pakai `queueService->advanceFromStation` (auto ke FARMASI kalau ada resep aktif). BPJS tetap flow normal ‚Äî tidak ada bypass.
- [Flow PREOP_BEDAH](feature_preop_bedah.md) ‚Äî 3 entry-point (A:jadwal hari ini, B:jadwal hari lain auto-shift, C:tanpa jadwal via dokter). visits.visit_type + surgery_schedule_id, audit log shift, 3 tempat skip auto-enqueue DOKTER, tombol "Kirim ke Bedah" oleh perawat/dokter umum.
- [Ruang OK Setting](feature_ruang_ok_setting.md) ‚Äî daftar Ruang OK disimpan di clinic_profiles.operating_rooms (JSON array, default 3), diedit di Profil Klinik, dipakai BedahView.
- [Antrean TV](feature_antrean_tv.md) ‚Äî grid 8 stasiun, FIFO call queue, 11 audio preset, tab Tampilan + **Media backend-persisted** (sync semua TV via TvMediaUpdated, upload file/external URL/YouTube/slideshow, panel 16:9 stage, placeholder centered). **Bug fixed 2026-05-28**: PerawatService panggil/mulai/lewati delegate ke QueueService biar TV ikut broadcast. **+Audio unlock overlay full-screen** (blokir UI sampai user klik ‚Äî fix TV publik tidak pernah disentuh, autoplay policy reset tiap reload tengah malam). **Gotcha**: doctor_schedules.room=nomor, poliklinik=nama.
- [Queue Advance Pattern](queue_advance_station_pattern.md) ‚Äî semua service station WAJIB delegasi ke `QueueService::advanceFromStation`, jangan hardcode `current_station`/queue status. Itu sumber tunggal routing + broadcast TV. Audit: PerawatService (fixed 2026-05-28) & KasirService::processPayment (fixed 2026-05-29).
- [Feedback: bertahap & konfirmasi](feedback_bertahap_konfirmasi.md) ‚Äî user prefer kerja per poin plan, tunggu konfirmasi sebelum lanjut, jangan eksekusi semua sekaligus
- [Feedback: Vue underscore tag bug](feedback_vue_underscore_tag_bug.md) ‚Äî Vue 3.5 compiler panic dengan `<_Component>` + named slot kompleks. Workaround: alias variable import tanpa underscore
- [Feedback: Vue literal mustache `{{...}}`](feedback_vue_literal_mustache.md) ‚Äî Vue 3.5 compile fail saat `{{ '{{key}}' }}` di template ‚Üí "Failed to fetch dynamically imported module" + route blank. WAJIB HTML entity `{{...}}` atau `v-pre`.
- [Feedback: Vue v-show unmount bug](feedback_vue_vshow_unmount_bug.md) ‚Äî v-show + Transition + child component ‚Üí freeze. Pakai v-if untuk wizard/tab dalam modal Transition.
- [Feedback: MasterFormModal gotcha (v-model loop, `*` wajib, z-index)](feedback_vue_vmodel_object_loop.md) ‚Äî (1) `v-model` objek + 2 deep watcher spread `{...}` ‚Üí "Maximum recursive updates exceeded", fix guard bandingkan nilai (JSON.stringify); (2) field wajib `*` dibuat merah+legenda (akurat = `required:true` config = rule backend); (3) modal anak KFA harus z-index > 9000 (MasterFormModal pakai 9000) biar tak muncul di belakang. Semua form master.
- [Feedback: photo_url di array literal patient](feedback_patient_photo_url_pick.md) ‚Äî service yang pick kolom `patient` manual sering lupa `photo_url` ‚Üí PatientAvatar fallback ke inisial. Audit semua formatter sejenis.
- [Feedback: styling visibility (tombol primary + text hitam)](feedback_styling_visibility.md) ‚Äî `var(--pri)` polos sering invisible di env user; pakai `#1763d4` + `color: #fff !important` + paksa semua text `#000` untuk visibility maksimal.
- [Feedback: timezone WIB](feedback_timezone_wib.md) ‚Äî backend timezone Asia/Jakarta bukan UTC, fix boundary reset harian penomoran antrean (config:clear wajib, data lama tak perlu migrasi)
- [Feedback: print A4 blank ‚Üí reset base.css](feedback_print_a4_basecss_reset.md) ‚Äî @media print WAJIB reset html/body min-width:1280px+height:100% & pakai #app display:none, kalau tidak kwitansi/struk blank. Fix KasirView 2026-05-29.
- [Feedback: flex column scroll sibling trap](feedback_flex_column_scroll_sibling.md) ‚Äî jangan tambah section sibling ke scroll area (`flex:1; overflow-y:auto`) di parent flex column ‚Äî scroll area terdesak jadi sliver. Taruh DI DALAM scroll area.
- [Feedback: PHP SSL cacert Windows](feedback_php_ssl_cacert_windows.md) ‚Äî cURL error 60 (self-signed cert in chain) ke API eksternal = PHP Windows tanpa CA bundle, BUKAN bug kode. Fix: download cacert.pem + set curl.cainfo/openssl.cafile di php.ini + restart. Jangan matikan verify SSL.
- [HowTo: Tes Manual Satu Sehat](howto_test_satusehat_manual.md) ‚Äî prosedur tes end-to-end Bridging Satu Sehat di UI (sandbox): konfigurasi‚ÜíTest‚ÜíAktifkan, isi NIK dokter (Data Pengguna) & KFA obat (Inventori Farmasi/Cari KFA), buat kunjungan SELESAI, Sync Manual di tab Satu Sehat, verifikasi 4 stat-card + log. NIK sandbox uji + cara tinker cepat.
- [Request Unit Notifikasi & Pending Tab](feature_request_unit_notif.md) ‚Äî RequestUnitView: tab Pending (APPROVED), history exclude APPROVED. FarmasiView Manajemen Stok: bell + polling 10s (Reverb tidak aktif: `BROADCAST_CONNECTION=log` + VITE_REVERB_APP_KEY kosong), diff snapshot status request/retur station=FARMASI.
- [Stok Per-Lokasi](feature_stok_per_lokasi.md) ‚Äî inventory_stocks dapat kolom `location` (INVENTORI/BEDAH/FARMASI). Deliver request unit = TRANSFER gudang‚Üíunit (stok pindah, tak hilang), dispensing/bedah/retur konsumsi STRICT lokasi unit. Memperbaiki bug stok hilang saat barang diterima unit. Verified 2026-05-29.
- [Request & Retur Unit ‚Äî UX & FEFO](feature_unit_request_retur.md) ‚Äî Tab Status (APPROVED/DELIVERED) terpisah Histori, label CLOSED="Diterima", batch/expiry auto-FEFO (consumeStock return array batch_no/expiry), generator nomor MAX+1 raw + retry 23505 (8x), default `/inventori-farmasi`‚Üírequest-unit, **Data Stock pindah ke kolom-3 if-grid (komponen InventoriStockSidebar) ‚Äî bukan lagi di dalam card RequestUnitView**, endpoint `/inventori-farmasi/stock/{type}`. **+verified 2026-05-29: sidebar BUKAN read-only ‚Äî ada Opname (modal batch/delta, applyDelta FEFO/OPNAME, IOL skip) + CSV stok (code,name,qty). Admin RequestUnitView 4 tab: Permintaan/Pending/Retur/History(2 sub). sidebar tampil di SEMUA sub-route /inventori-farmasi.**
- [Form Registry ‚Äî Fase 1-6 + v2 gap-fix done](feature_form_registry.md) ‚Äî modul template form RM. Fase 1-6 done 2026-05-28, **v2 gap-fix DONE 2026-05-30 (semua 13 gap selesai)**. Migration gzip applied, smalot/pdfparser v2.12 installed, PMK24 test 4/6 pass + 2 skip (pdo_sqlite missing). v2: SubmitRouter adapter dokterExam+medicalResume + server-side validation (422 per-field, re-map column‚ÜífieldKey), UI Addendum + Audit Log tab + patient_id auto-context, AggregateResolver visitServices+diagnosticResults, multi_checkbox options[], PDF parser, multi-page wizard, gzip storage `rendered_html_gz`. **Gotcha**: render() skip signature_canvas keepUnknown=true; document_addenda explicit $table; hash `Y-m-d H:i:s`; dev DB Postgres (no sqlite ext).
- [TTD Dokumen View](feature_ttd_dokumen_view.md) ‚Äî antrian TTD dokter (`TtdDokumenView.vue`, bagian Form Registry). **Rencana revamp BELUM dieksekusi (plan disetujui konsep, user minta simpan memory dulu 2026-05-29)**: split-view (list kiri + preview kanan persisten, buang 2-modal-bertumpuk), multi-TTD = capture ULANG tiap dokumen (tombol "Lewati" di dalam SignatureCaptureModal via prop `progress`+`@skip`), warna primer `var(--ga)` #1f7d4a, template_name PERLU (tweak kecil `ttdQueueForDoctor`) tapi photo_url TIDAK (avatar inisial), alert()‚Üítoast. Plan: plans/uinya-belum-bagus-bagaimana-memoized-blossom.md.
- [Master Jenis Dokumen RM ‚Äî UI CRUD](feature_document_type_master.md) ‚Äî 2026-05-30: UI editable untuk `document_types` di `/master-data/document-type`. 4 endpoint (CRUD + anti-circular parent + delete-guard 3 layer: template/dokumen/child). Sidebar section "Form Rekam Medis" ‚Üí 2 item (Jenis Dokumen di atas, Template Form RM). Permission `form_template.read|write`. Fundamental karena setiap klinik beda struktur form RM.
- [Rujukan (Internal & Eksternal)](feature_rujukan_internal_antar_poli.md) ‚Äî 2026-05-30: kartu "Rujuk" DokterView Tab 4 **dua-mode**. (1) INTERNAL antar sub-spesialis (Mata Umum‚ÜíRetina/Glaukoma) via pola **visit-anak** (`parent_visit_id`), jadwal-aware (praktik hari ini‚Üíenqueue DOKTER; tidak‚Üípenanda ADMISI, daftar ulang), tombol sendiri. (2) EXTERNAL faskes lain: pasien BPJS‚Üí**VClaim `insertRujukanKeluar`** (blocking, form lengkap cari faskes/poli referensi + tombol "Terbitkan Rujukan BPJS", simpan noRujukan), non-BPJS‚Üílokal. Backend+frontend LIVE (smoke 35/35, build hijau). (3) **SURAT KONTROL BPJS** (planning Pulang+tgl kontrol): backend sudah lengkap (`postSuratKontrol`‚Üí/RencanaKontrol/v2/Insert), ditambah UI ‚Äî terbit **OTOMATIS non-blocking saat finalisasi** (doFinalize 1-tombol, tak ada Simpan terpisah), panel hasil No.SK/FAILED di sub-panel Pulang. (4) **EDIT SURAT KONTROL** disisip di **AdmisiView modal Detail Kunjungan** (keputusan user: semua op edit BPJS di kartu detail Admisi): section SKDP placeholder‚Üífungsional, edit tgl kontrol (PUT updateRencanaKontrol) hanya jika status SUCCESS. (5) **EDIT/UPDATE SEP** di section SEP modal detail Admisi (form ringkas 5 field: kls_rawat/diag/catatan/no_telp/katarak; `PUT /admisi/bpjs/update-sep`). NB: "Edit SEP"="Update SEP" = 1 operasi VClaim `/SEP/2.0/update` (bukan 2 hal beda). (6) **BADGE sisi penerima SELESAI**: banner "‚Ü™ rujukan internal dari Poli X" di modal Detail Kunjungan Admisi + badge `.ptg-rujuk` di patient bar Dokter (eager-load `internalReferralFromSchedule`). SEP Internal BPJS DITUNDA. **Sisa**: Cetak SEP A4; prefill form Edit SEP dari SEP existing (kini kosong); uji E2E semua jalur BPJS dgn VClaim sandbox (belum teruji nyata). ‚öÝÔ∏è Insiden 2026-05-30: jangan tumpuk tool-call paralel (reasoning bocor ke AdmisiView, sudah pulih); file hantu `backend/backend/...000010` dihapus; git BELUM commit (user tunda).
- [Logo Klinik / Kop Surat](feature_clinic_logo_kop_surat.md) ‚Äî 2026-05-30 Level 1: upload logo di Profil Klinik (POST/DELETE `/master/profil-klinik/logo`, disk public, max 2MB, png/jpg/svg/webp). BindingResolver auto-convert `*_path` clinic ‚Üí absolute URL via `Storage::url()`. DocumentRenderer wrap `<img>` saat field.type='image_url'. Cara pakai di template: insert `{{clinic_logo}}` + bind ke `clinic.logo_path`. Level 2/3 (auto kop, signature_path UI, base64 inline) ditunda.

# Memory Index

- [Instance: Arumed-PrimaVision](project_instance_arumed_primavision.md) ‚Äî duplikat di `D:\Arumed-PrimaVision`, RS Mata Prima Vision Medan (RSKMPV), tema biru, DB `dbprimavision`/pw `arumed`.
- [BUG: DoctorScheduleSeeder week_start](bug_doctorscheduleseeder_week_start.md) ‚Äî seed DB bersih baru gagal (week_start NOT NULL tak diisi); fixed di clone PrimaVision, belum di master.

- [Arumed Project](project_arumed.md) ‚Äî Vue 3.5 + Laravel 13.8 HIS oftalmologi, status modul, pola wajib (skill, envelope, RBAC)
- [Nakes Profile (NIP/SIP/STR) di Data Pengguna](feature_nakes_profile_data_pengguna.md) ‚Äî 2026-05-30 gap ditutup: input NIP/SIP/STR di modal user (role nakes klinis), `UserService::syncEmployeeProfile` tulis ke employees + auto-buat employee bila perlu. CSV pengguna sip/str belum.
- [PRE-GO-LIVE BUG AUDIT](project_pre_golive_bug_audit.md) ‚Äî Audit E2E 2026-05-29: **9 bug ditemukan & SEMUA DIPERBAIKI** (branch `fix/pre-golive-500-bugs`, belum merge main). #1-6 (asuransi 500/route ordering/consent gzip/dll), #7 dispensing‚Üíinventory_stocks FEFO, #8 zombie row 7 stasiun, #9 prescription dose/frequency hilang. + smoke test (`composer smoke` 35/35) + `BedahDemoSeeder` (demo bedah/farmasi/kasir/TTD). Inti sistem sehat. Pakai curl bukan PowerShell utk test auth.
- [Realtime Antrean (WebSocket/Reverb)](feature_realtime_antrean.md) ‚Äî WS Reverb DISIAPKAN 2026-05-30 (install+config publish) tapi belum aktif (`BROADCAST=log`); antrean jalan polling **8s seragam** (dulu 30s). Channel public, broadcast sudah di QueueService. Aktivasi produksi = isi `.env` + `reverb:start`. Panduan `Docs/REALTIME-ANTREAN-WEBSOCKET.md`.
- [Master Data Stage 1+2 (post-rev)](feature_master_data_stage1.md) ‚Äî Stage 1: 8 resource. Rev 2026-05-26 malam: Tarif Tindakan pindah ke Tarif&Paket, Obat/BHP/IOL pindah ke Inventori Farmasi. Master Data sekarang: Profil/ICD-10/ICD-9/Wilayah. Procedures schema baru (code autogen TND-001 per kategori).
- [Tarif & Paket Bedah](feature_tarif_paket_bedah.md) ‚Äî 3 section: Tarif Tindakan + Metode Bayar (insurers TPA parent/child inheritance + tarif tindakan per-insurer) + Paket Bedah. Container max-width 1600px. CSV tanpa kode (lookup by nama+kategori). **+CSV Import/Export Paket Bedah (long format, 4 item_type, replace komposisi, tarif jual tidak ikut) 2026-05-29.**
- [Inventori Farmasi](feature_inventori_farmasi.md) ‚Äî modul standalone Obat/BHP/IOL/**Alat Medis** di /inventori-farmasi/*, permission `inventori_farmasi.*`, view fisik tetap di views/master-data/ (router reroute). Master sekarang TANPA harga/stok (Obat: + satuan besar/kecil/konversi; BHP: kode auto-gen BHP-NNN + 4 kategori tertutup; IOL: tanpa stok/harga; **Alat Medis: master aset reusable, code auto-gen MEQ-NNN, tarif flat per insurer**). Harga di sub-menu Penentuan Harga.
- [Master CSV Pipeline](feature_master_csv_pipeline.md) ‚Äî pipeline generic template/export/import CSV master (MasterDataService + CSV_TYPES + REGISTRY). Cara nambah resource (5 langkah), exclude `code` auto-gen, by-name vs uniqueKey upsert, petunjuk "#" di template. **Audit besar 2026-05-30**: fix bug IOL import (kunci serial‚Üíbrand+model+power), empty-stock crash (`castCsvCell`), rules tindakan (harga‚â•0/kategori case-insensitive/status), **tarif & paket bedah** (export skip master soft-deleted + notes "#" + csvDataLines), **CSV per-paket di halaman detail Paket Bedah** (template terisi). Validasi enum category obat/bhp saat import MASIH belum.
- [Inventori ‚Äî Penentuan Harga (HPP & HJA)](feature_inventori_harga.md) ‚Äî sub-menu /inventori-farmasi/harga. Tabel `inventory_prices` + setting global `ppn_rate`. Formula: HJA = HPP √ó (1+margin%) √ó (PPN?). Recompute auto saat ppn_rate diubah.
- [Pembelian & Penerimaan](feature_pembelian_penerimaan.md) ‚Äî sub-menu Supplier/Pembelian(PO)/Penerimaan(GRN) di /inventori-farmasi/*. 6 tabel baru, stok per-batch+expiry, status PO auto dari GRN, validasi over-receive. RBAC: 3 modul baru (supplier/pembelian/penerimaan). HPP tetap manual (tidak auto). **+Cetak PO A4 (Teleport+window.print, kop+logo) dgn blok TTD: Pemohon = e-sign teks ringan (badge "‚úì ditandatangani elektronik" + created_at¬∑po_number, BUKAN canvas), Direktur = TTD basah kosong dari Profil Klinik. 2026-05-29.**
- [Anjungan Kiosk](feature_anjungan_kiosk.md) ‚Äî UMUM wired, BPJS disabled (menunggu client ID VClaim, mockDB sudah dihapus total). Heartbeat /up + envelope guard. **Thermal print 80mm fix 2026-05-29: Teleport #print-ticket ke body + @media print unscoped (#app display:none, reset base.css min-width/height, @page 72mm) ‚Äî dulu blank.**
- [Admisi View](feature_admisi_view.md) ‚Äî cleanup 2026-05-26: buang familyPhone/company/sosial/diagnosis (backend tidak simpan), wire wilayah ‚Üí WilayahPicker emsifa, print thermal antrean. **+2026-05-28: stat cards per-penjamin = invoice PAID, card Umum (7 card 1-baris). +2026-05-29: tgl lahir DD/MM/YYYY di konfirmasi, SOSIAL‚Üítarif (sudah jalan), COB WIRED (visit_cob, penjamin2 selalu ASURANSI, hanya utk penjamin utama ASURANSI/PERUSAHAAN; billing tetap penjamin utama, split plafon masih placeholder).**

Target: 4 resource statistik + dashboard /bridging. **EKSEKUSI 2026-05-30: FASE 1+2+3+4 SELESAI ‚Äî 4 RESOURCE STATISTIK SEMUA TERKIRIM SUNGGUHAN ke sandbox (Encounter/Condition/Medication/MedicationRequest/MedicationDispense, HTTP 200 semua 201 Created, statistik naik).** Via FHIR transaction Bundle (urn:uuid). Temuan: Encounter WAJIB identifier+location+diagnosis (Location TIDAK opsional‚Üíauto-register jadi); obat WAJIB resource Medication terpisah (medicationReference) + extension medicationType NC + identifier system /prescription/{org} + UCUM valid (mapper ucumCode, fallback `[arb'U]`; tolak {tablet}/1/[iU]); idempoten by-identifier (duplicate 20002‚Üíresolve). NIK dokter uji `1271161411980001`‚ÜíIHS `10010456878`. KFA via `/kfa-v2/products/all`. **FASE 5 (scheduler `satusehat:batch-sync` 23:59+01:00, batchSync‚ÜísyncVisitBundle) & FASE 6 (dashboard: endpoint `/integrasi/satusehat/dashboard` + `BridgingSatusehatView` tab Satu Sehat) SELESAI.** **LENGKAP 2026-05-30**: +UI kfa_code & tombol Cari KFA di master Obat (endpoint `/integrasi/satusehat/kfa-search`, field.action generik di MasterFormModal) +CSV kfa_code +UI NIK dokter di DataPenggunaView (`PUT /integrasi/satusehat/dokter/{id}/nik`, muncul saat role dokter+ada employee, ganti NIK reset IHS). Sisa hanya operasional produksi (isi NIK/KFA asli, kredensial prod, Location per ruang opsional). Gotcha: [[feedback-php-ssl-cacert-windows]] + Write-tool file baru‚Üílokasi hantu (Bash cat) + patients.nik UNIQUE + response Satu Sehat di entry[].response bukan .resource. Plan: Docs/PLAN-BRIDGING-SATUSEHAT-ARUMED.md.
- [Rekam Medis RME](feature_rekam_medis_rme.md) ‚Äî revamp 2026-05-29 master-detail (dari halaman rusak). `RmeAggregatorService` 7 method + 8 endpoint `/pasien/{id}/{menu}`, agregasi seluruh aktivitas kunjungan. Frontend kiri-menu/kanan-tabel (1 baris/kunjungan + expand), obat=diresepkan, addendum PER-DOKUMEN (Form Registry), audit drawer, cetak resume A4. Build hijau + smoke-test OK. Spec: docs/spec-rekam-medis-rme.md.

content.text:
Saya sudah baca seluruh MEMORY.md (64 baris index). Masalahnya jelas: **banyak baris index yang jadi paragraf panjang** (200‚Äì2000+ char), terutama baris 22, 28, 51, 54, 63. Aturannya: satu baris index ‚â§ ~200 char, detail pindah ke file topik.

Saya akan rapikan dengan **memendekkan baris-baris index jadi hook singkat** ‚Äî detail lengkapnya sudah ada di file topik masing-masing, jadi tidak ada info yang hilang. Saya pangkas yang paling panjang.

Berikut versi rapi MEMORY.md:

input.content:
# Memory Index

- [Instance: Arumed-PrimaVision](project_instance_arumed_primavision.md) ‚Äî duplikat di `D:\Arumed-PrimaVision`, RS Mata Prima Vision Medan (RSKMPV), tema biru, DB `dbprimavision`/pw `arumed`.
- [BUG: DoctorScheduleSeeder week_start](bug_doctorscheduleseeder_week_start.md) ‚Äî seed DB bersih gagal (week_start NOT NULL tak diisi); fixed di clone, belum di master.

- [Arumed Project](project_arumed.md) ‚Äî Vue 3.5 + Laravel 13.8 HIS oftalmologi; status modul, pola wajib (skill, envelope, RBAC).
- [Nakes Profile (NIP/SIP/STR)](feature_nakes_profile_data_pengguna.md) ‚Äî input NIP/SIP/STR di modal user (role nakes klinis), `UserService::syncEmployeeProfile`. CSV sip/str belum.
- [PRE-GO-LIVE BUG AUDIT](project_pre_golive_bug_audit.md) ‚Äî Audit E2E 2026-05-29: 9 bug ditemukan & SEMUA difix (branch `fix/pre-golive-500-bugs`, belum merge) + smoke 35/35 + `BedahDemoSeeder`. Inti sehat. Test auth pakai curl.
- [Realtime Antrean (Reverb)](feature_realtime_antrean.md) ‚Äî WS Reverb disiapkan tapi belum aktif (`BROADCAST=log`); antrean polling 8s. Aktivasi = isi `.env` + `reverb:start`.
- [Master Data Stage 1+2](feature_master_data_stage1.md) ‚Äî Master Data kini: Profil/ICD-10/ICD-9/Wilayah (Tarif‚ÜíTarif&Paket, Obat/BHP/IOL‚ÜíInventori). Procedures code autogen TND-001 per kategori.
- [Tarif & Paket Bedah](feature_tarif_paket_bedah.md) ‚Äî 3 section: Tarif Tindakan + Metode Bayar (insurer TPA parent/child + tarif per-insurer) + Paket Bedah. CSV by nama+kategori. +CSV import/export paket (long format).
- [Inventori Farmasi](feature_inventori_farmasi.md) ‚Äî modul standalone Obat/BHP/IOL/Alat Medis di /inventori-farmasi/*, permission `inventori_farmasi.*`. Master TANPA harga/stok; harga di sub-menu Penentuan Harga.
- [Master CSV Pipeline](feature_master_csv_pipeline.md) ‚Äî pipeline generic template/export/import CSV (MasterDataService + REGISTRY). Cara nambah resource, by-name vs uniqueKey. Audit besar 2026-05-30. Validasi enum category obat/bhp belum.
- [Inventori ‚Äî Penentuan Harga](feature_inventori_harga.md) ‚Äî sub-menu /inventori-farmasi/harga. `inventory_prices` + `ppn_rate`. HJA = HPP √ó (1+margin%) √ó (PPN?). Recompute auto.
- [Pembelian & Penerimaan](feature_pembelian_penerimaan.md) ‚Äî Supplier/PO/GRN, stok per-batch+expiry, status PO auto dari GRN. HPP manual. +Cetak PO A4 (e-sign pemohon + TTD basah direktur).
- [Anjungan Kiosk](feature_anjungan_kiosk.md) ‚Äî UMUM wired, BPJS disabled (tunggu client ID VClaim). Heartbeat /up + envelope guard. Thermal print 80mm fixed (Teleport + @media print unscoped).
- [Admisi View](feature_admisi_view.md) ‚Äî cleanup + WilayahPicker + print thermal; stat cards per-penjamin (invoice PAID); tgl lahir DD/MM/YYYY; SOSIAL‚Üítarif; COB wired (split plafon masih placeholder).
- [Visit Active Guard + UI](feature_visit_active_guard.md) ‚Äî antrian difilter HARIAN; guard `registerVisit` tolak >1 visit aktif (422); badge/banner active_visit; filter "Belum Selesai (semua tgl)". Belum ada auto-cleanup visit basi.
- [Perawat View](feature_perawat_view.md) ‚Äî 4 tab‚Üí1 card, validation TD+KGD+keluhan wajib. +CPPT timeline (`nurse_cppt_entries`, append+soft-edit). Bugfix pickPatient + action-row 3 v-if independen.
- [Refraksionis View](feature_refraksionis_view.md) ‚Äî wire skipPt, payload lengkap (keratometri+kacamata lama+ADD+prescription), prefill, saveStep persist, filter "Umum & Asuransi", button-press tier-3.
- [Dokter Demo Seeder](feature_dokter_demo_seeder.md) ‚Äî `DokterDemoSeeder` (manual): 3 pasien UMUM/BPJS/ASURANSI per dokter on-duty + 2 kunjungan lama finalized. Wajib visit.doctor_schedule_id; NIK+bpjs_number UNIQUE.
- [DokterView Module](dokterview-module.md) ‚Äî SOAP Tab 4 auto-sync via watch; doFinalize cuma advance queue (Tab 2/4 tak persist); autosave 600ms; tarif via [[kasir-getprice-resolve]]. +Tab 4 Bedah jam opsional. +Form Registry pindah ke MODAL (FormDocsBrowser) + topbar identitas dokter.
- [Flow Penunjang ‚Üî Dokter](flow_penunjang_dokter.md) ‚Äî DI_PENUNJANG (turun) vs SELESAI_PENUNJANG (naik), `requeueToDokter` reuse baris, 2 trigger, order baru staging lokal.
- [KasirService::getPrice](kasir_getprice_resolve.md) ‚Äî sentral tariff resolver per insurer (procedure/medication/bhp/iol/equipment). TPA-aware via `Insurer::tariffInsurerId()`. Pattern Rp 0/inactive = BPJS skip.
- [Billing Items Expansion](feature_billing_items_expansion.md) ‚Äî BHP loop fix di consolidateBilling, 4 kategori BHP tertutup, Medical Equipment flat usage fee per insurer. Forward-only. BPJS skip via Rp 0/inactive.
- [Bedah Terjadwal View](feature_bedah_terjadwal_view.md) ‚Äî `/bedah/terjadwal` 2 tab: Pasien Terjadwal (weekpicker + IOL biometri) + Request (3-sumber, Terima/Retur). Request paket ‚Üí unit-request. Pasien via `visits.surgery_schedule_id`.
- [Bedah View](feature_bedah_view.md) ‚Äî `/bedah/antrian` (panggil+selesai‚ÜíKASIR), polling 15s, badge PREOP. +Intraoperatif: pemakaian BHP + Alat Medis. +jam-bedah opsional (null‚Üí"belum diatur"). Ruang OK dari Profil Klinik.
- [Kasir View](feature_kasir_view.md) ‚Äî revamp: kartu antrean + tier-3, diskon flex (Rp/% per-item & global), cetak via Teleport. +Penunjang masuk invoice, master Kategori Tagihan (`billing_categories`), consolidateBilling 7 builder, routing via advanceFromStation. BPJS normal.
- [Flow PREOP_BEDAH](feature_preop_bedah.md) ‚Äî 3 entry-point (jadwal hari ini / hari lain auto-shift / tanpa jadwal). visit_type + surgery_schedule_id, audit log shift, skip auto-enqueue DOKTER, tombol "Kirim ke Bedah".
- [Ruang OK Setting](feature_ruang_ok_setting.md) ‚Äî daftar Ruang OK di clinic_profiles.operating_rooms (JSON, default 3), diedit di Profil Klinik, dipakai BedahView.
- [Antrean TV](feature_antrean_tv.md) ‚Äî grid 8 stasiun, FIFO, 11 audio preset, Media backend-persisted (sync via TvMediaUpdated). +Audio unlock overlay. Gotcha: doctor_schedules.room=nomor, poliklinik=nama.
- [Queue Advance Pattern](queue_advance_station_pattern.md) ‚Äî semua service station WAJIB delegasi ke `QueueService::advanceFromStation`, jangan hardcode current_station/queue status. Sumber tunggal routing + broadcast TV.
- [Feedback: bertahap & konfirmasi](feedback_bertahap_konfirmasi.md) ‚Äî user prefer kerja per poin plan, tunggu konfirmasi, jangan eksekusi semua sekaligus.
- [Feedback: Vue underscore tag bug](feedback_vue_underscore_tag_bug.md) ‚Äî Vue 3.5 panic `<_Component>` + named slot. Workaround: alias import tanpa underscore.
- [Feedback: Vue literal mustache](feedback_vue_literal_mustache.md) ‚Äî `{{ '{{key}}' }}` di template ‚Üí route blank. WAJIB HTML entity `{...` atau `v-pre`.
- [Feedback: Vue v-show unmount bug](feedback_vue_vshow_unmount_bug.md) ‚Äî v-show + Transition + child ‚Üí freeze. Pakai v-if untuk wizard/tab dalam modal Transition.
- [Feedback: MasterFormModal gotcha](feedback_vue_vmodel_object_loop.md) ‚Äî v-model objek + deep watcher spread ‚Üí recursive update (guard JSON.stringify); field wajib `*` merah; modal anak KFA z-index > 9000.
- [Feedback: photo_url di array patient](feedback_patient_photo_url_pick.md) ‚Äî formatter manual sering lupa `photo_url` ‚Üí PatientAvatar fallback inisial. Audit semua formatter sejenis.
- [Feedback: styling visibility](feedback_styling_visibility.md) ‚Äî `var(--pri)` polos sering invisible; pakai `#1763d4` + `color:#fff !important` + paksa text `#000`.
- [Feedback: timezone WIB](feedback_timezone_wib.md) ‚Äî backend timezone Asia/Jakarta bukan UTC; fix boundary reset harian penomoran antrean (config:clear wajib).
- [Feedback: print A4 blank](feedback_print_a4_basecss_reset.md) ‚Äî @media print WAJIB reset html/body min-width+height & `#app display:none`, kalau tidak struk blank.
- [Feedback: flex column scroll sibling](feedback_flex_column_scroll_sibling.md) ‚Äî jangan tambah section sibling ke scroll area (`flex:1;overflow-y:auto`) di parent flex column. Taruh DI DALAM scroll area.
- [Feedback: PHP SSL cacert Windows](feedback_php_ssl_cacert_windows.md) ‚Äî cURL err 60 = PHP Windows tanpa CA bundle, BUKAN bug. Fix: cacert.pem + curl.cainfo/openssl.cafile di php.ini. Jangan matikan verify SSL.
- [HowTo: Tes Manual Satu Sehat](howto_test_satusehat_manual.md) ‚Äî prosedur tes E2E Bridging Satu Sehat di UI sandbox: konfigurasi‚ÜíTest‚ÜíAktifkan, isi NIK dokter & KFA obat, kunjungan SELESAI, Sync Manual, verifikasi stat-card + log.
- [Request Unit Notif & Pending](feature_request_unit_notif.md) ‚Äî RequestUnitView tab Pending (APPROVED); FarmasiView bell + polling 10s (Reverb off), diff snapshot status request/retur station=FARMASI.
- [Stok Per-Lokasi](feature_stok_per_lokasi.md) ‚Äî inventory_stocks +kolom `location` (INVENTORI/BEDAH/FARMASI). Deliver = TRANSFER gudang‚Üíunit; konsumsi STRICT lokasi unit. Fix bug stok hilang.
- [Request & Retur Unit ‚Äî UX & FEFO](feature_unit_request_retur.md) ‚Äî Tab Status terpisah Histori, batch/expiry auto-FEFO, generator MAX+1 retry 23505. Data Stock = InventoriStockSidebar kolom-3 (Opname + CSV stok). Admin 4 tab.
- [Form Registry ‚Äî Fase 1-6 + v2](feature_form_registry.md) ‚Äî modul template form RM. Fase 1-6 + v2 gap-fix DONE 2026-05-30 (13 gap). SubmitRouter, validasi 422 per-field, Addendum, Audit Log, AggregateResolver, PDF parser, wizard, gzip. Gotcha: dev DB Postgres (no sqlite).
- [TTD Dokumen View](feature_ttd_dokumen_view.md) ‚Äî antrian TTD dokter. Rencana revamp BELUM dieksekusi (split-view, multi-TTD capture ulang, warna `var(--ga)`, toast). Plan: plans/uinya-belum-bagus-...md.
- [Master Jenis Dokumen RM](feature_document_type_master.md) ‚Äî UI CRUD `document_types` di /master-data/document-type. 4 endpoint (anti-circular + delete-guard 3 layer). Permission `form_template.read|write`.
- [Rujukan (Internal & Eksternal)](feature_rujukan_internal_antar_poli.md) ‚Äî DokterView Tab 4 dua-mode: INTERNAL (visit-anak parent_visit_id, jadwal-aware) + EXTERNAL (BPJS‚ÜíVClaim insertRujukanKeluar). +Surat Kontrol BPJS otomatis saat finalisasi; Edit Surat Kontrol & Update SEP di modal Detail Admisi; badge sisi penerima. Sisa: cetak SEP A4, prefill Edit SEP, uji E2E BPJS. ‚öÝÔ∏è jangan tumpuk tool-call paralel.
- [Logo Klinik / Kop Surat](feature_clinic_logo_kop_surat.md) ‚Äî Level 1: upload logo di Profil Klinik. BindingResolver auto-convert `*_path` ‚Üí absolute URL. Pakai `{{clinic_logo}}` bind ke `clinic.logo_path`. Level 2/3 ditunda.
- [PENDING: Kategori Billing Mapping UI](project_kategori_billing_mapping_pending.md) ‚Äî ide user: master Kategori Tagihan jadi pusat + pemetaan via UI. 3 keputusan belum dijawab. Tanya ulang saat user balik.
- [Bridging VClaim/Antrean](feature_bridging_vclaim.md) ‚Äî AUTHORITATIVE & LIVE. VCLAIM PRODUCTION LIVE 2026-05-30. Gotcha config: base_url WAJIB `https://`, kode_faskes `0038R137`, prod=vclaim-rest. SEP=ASLI. BpjsClient (HMAC+AES/LZString) + 41 route. UI /bridging. Permission `integrasi.*`.
- [Asuransi Cover ‚Üí Kasir](feature_asuransi_cover_kasir.md) ‚Äî covered_amount di invoice+verif; full cover=konfirmasi (INSURANCE), partial=bayar selisih; tab "Sedang Dilayani"; endpoint confirm-coverage.
- [Modul Asuransi/TPA Non-BPJS](feature_insurance_tpa.md) ‚Äî LIVE. 6 migration + AsuransiService/Controller (19 endpoint) + AsuransiView 3 tab. Auto-draft klaim setelah PAID jika VERIFIED. Tidak sentuh BPJS. +fix wait_minutes dari verifications.created_at.
- [Penunjang View](feature_penunjang_view.md) ‚Äî revamp: filter kiri 2-baris, per-order workflow (Mulai/Input/Selesai), form Biometri OD/OS, upload attachment, global disable saat pending. Biometri kode BIOM.
- [Penunjang Tarif Wiring](feature_penunjang_tarif_wiring.md) ‚Äî arsitektur FINAL procedure-based: penunjang = procedures kategori "Penunjang"; diagnostic_test_types jadi MIRROR via ProcedureObserver; billing resolve getPrice('procedure'). Tab Jenis Penunjang read-only. Card preview Tab 3 jangan push ke tindakanList (dobel-tagih).
- [Jadwal Dokter v2](feature_jadwal_dokter_v2.md) ‚Äî per-minggu (`week_start` Senin via Carbon WIB), service_type BPJS/EKSEKUTIF, prefix `{poli_code}{room}`, 2 tab + Salin minggu + Import CSV. DONE build hijau. SISA: QueueService masih `D{room}`, perlu disambung ke poli_code.
- [RBAC User Management](feature_rbac_user_management.md) ‚Äî DataPenggunaView CSV export/import pengguna, PIN TTD dokter (`users.pin` + POST /dokter/verify-pin, ganti hardcode 1234), reset password/PIN khusus superadmin (gate 403).
- [General Consent di Admisi](feature_general_consent_admisi.md) ‚Äî GC di AdmisiView step 3 (pasien baru, TTD inline tanpa visit_id via renderForPreview). Fix: gzip‚Üíbytea Postgres invalid UTF8 (juga di finalize) + layout GC tanpa placeholder {{ttd_*}} (re-seed wajib).
- [Feedback: sisip Form Registry murah/mahal](feedback_form_registry_sisip_murah_mahal.md) ‚Äî taruh form di tombol = MURAH (reuse FormDocsBrowser) KECUALI syarat "isi/TTD sebelum Visit ada" (mahal). Sebut pemicu biaya di awal.
- [Bridging Satu Sehat](feature_bridging_satusehat.md) ‚Äî FHIR R4 Kemenkes. 4 resource statistik SEMUA TERKIRIM ke sandbox (Fase 1-6 SELESAI 2026-05-30) via FHIR transaction Bundle. +UI kfa_code & NIK dokter. Gotcha: Encounter wajib identifier+location+diagnosis, obat wajib Medication terpisah + UCUM valid, idempoten by-identifier. Sisa: operasional produksi. Plan: Docs/PLAN-BRIDGING-SATUSEHAT-ARUMED.md.
- [Rekam Medis RME](feature_rekam_medis_rme.md) ‚Äî revamp master-detail. RmeAggregatorService 7 method + 8 endpoint `/pasien/{id}/{menu}`. Frontend kiri-menu/kanan-tabel + expand, addendum per-dokumen, audit drawer, cetak resume A4. Spec: docs/spec-rekam-medis-rme.md.

+- [Dokter Demo Seeder](feature_dokter_demo_seeder.md) ‚Äî `DokterDemoSeeder` (manual): 3 pasien UMUM/BPJS/ASURANSI per dokter on-duty + 2 kunjungan lama finalized. Wajib visit.doctor_schedule_id; NIK+bpjs_number UNIQUE.

+- [DokterView Module](dokterview-module.md) ‚Äî SOAP Tab 4 auto-sync via watch; doFinalize cuma advance queue (Tab 2/4 tak persist); autosave 600ms; tarif via [[kasir-getprice-resolve]]. +Tab 4 Bedah jam opsional. +Form Registry pindah ke MODAL (FormDocsBrowser) + topbar identitas dokter.
+- [Flow Penunjang ‚Üî Dokter](flow_penunjang_dokter.md) ‚Äî DI_PENUNJANG (turun) vs SELESAI_PENUNJANG (naik), `requeueToDokter` reuse baris, 2 trigger, order baru staging lokal.

+- [KasirService::getPrice](kasir_getprice_resolve.md) ‚Äî sentral tariff resolver per insurer (procedure/medication/bhp/iol/equipment). TPA-aware via `Insurer::tariffInsurerId()`. Pattern Rp 0/inactive = BPJS skip.

+- [Billing Items Expansion](feature_billing_items_expansion.md) ‚Äî BHP loop fix di consolidateBilling, 4 kategori BHP tertutup, Medical Equipment flat usage fee per insurer. Forward-only. BPJS skip via Rp 0/inactive.

+- [Bedah Terjadwal View](feature_bedah_terjadwal_view.md) ‚Äî `/bedah/terjadwal` 2 tab: Pasien Terjadwal (weekpicker + IOL biometri) + Request (3-sumber, Terima/Retur). Request paket ‚Üí unit-request. Pasien via `visits.surgery_schedule_id`.

+- [Bedah View](feature_bedah_view.md) ‚Äî `/bedah/antrian` (panggil+selesai‚ÜíKASIR), polling 15s, badge PREOP. +Intraoperatif: pemakaian BHP + Alat Medis. +jam-bedah opsional (null‚Üí"belum diatur"). Ruang OK dari Profil Klinik.

+- [Kasir View](feature_kasir_view.md) ‚Äî revamp: kartu antrean + tier-3, diskon flex (Rp/% per-item & global), cetak via Teleport. +Penunjang masuk invoice, master Kategori Tagihan (`billing_categories`), consolidateBilling 7 builder, routing via advanceFromStation. BPJS normal.

+- [Flow PREOP_BEDAH](feature_preop_bedah.md) ‚Äî 3 entry-point (jadwal hari ini / hari lain auto-shift / tanpa jadwal). visit_type + surgery_schedule_id, audit log shift, skip auto-enqueue DOKTER, tombol "Kirim ke Bedah".
+- [Ruang OK Setting](feature_ruang_ok_setting.md) ‚Äî daftar Ruang OK di clinic_profiles.operating_rooms (JSON, default 3), diedit di Profil Klinik, dipakai BedahView.

+- [Antrean TV](feature_antrean_tv.md) ‚Äî grid 8 stasiun, FIFO, 11 audio preset, Media backend-persisted (sync via TvMediaUpdated). +Audio unlock overlay. Gotcha: doctor_schedules.room=nomor, poliklinik=nama.

+- [Queue Advance Pattern](queue_advance_station_pattern.md) ‚Äî semua service station WAJIB delegasi ke `QueueService::advanceFromStation`, jangan hardcode current_station/queue status. Sumber tunggal routing + broadcast TV.
+- [Feedback: bertahap & konfirmasi](feedback_bertahap_konfirmasi.md) ‚Äî user prefer kerja per poin plan, tunggu konfirmasi, jangan eksekusi semua sekaligus.
+- [Feedback: Vue underscore tag bug](feedback_vue_underscore_tag_bug.md) ‚Äî Vue 3.5 panic `<_Component>` + named slot. Workaround: alias import tanpa underscore.
+- [Feedback: Vue literal mustache](feedback_vue_literal_mustache.md) ‚Äî `{{ '{{key}}' }}` di template ‚Üí route blank. WAJIB HTML entity `{...` atau `v-pre`.
+- [Feedback: Vue v-show unmount bug](feedback_vue_vshow_unmount_bug.md) ‚Äî v-show + Transition + child ‚Üí freeze. Pakai v-if untuk wizard/tab dalam modal Transition.

+- [Feedback: MasterFormModal gotcha](feedback_vue_vmodel_object_loop.md) ‚Äî v-model objek + deep watcher spread ‚Üí recursive update (guard JSON.stringify); field wajib `*` merah; modal anak KFA z-index > 9000.
+- [Feedback: photo_url di array patient](feedback_patient_photo_url_pick.md) ‚Äî formatter manual sering lupa `photo_url` ‚Üí PatientAvatar fallback inisial. Audit semua formatter sejenis.
+- [Feedback: styling visibility](feedback_styling_visibility.md) ‚Äî `var(--pri)` polos sering invisible; pakai `#1763d4` + `color:#fff !important` + paksa text `#000`.
+- [Feedback: timezone WIB](feedback_timezone_wib.md) ‚Äî backend timezone Asia/Jakarta bukan UTC; fix boundary reset harian penomoran antrean (config:clear wajib).
+- [Feedback: print A4 blank](feedback_print_a4_basecss_reset.md) ‚Äî @media print WAJIB reset html/body min-width+height & `#app display:none`, kalau tidak struk blank.

+- [Feedback: flex column scroll sibling](feedback_flex_column_scroll_sibling.md) ‚Äî jangan tambah section sibling ke scroll area (`flex:1;overflow-y:auto`) di parent flex column. Taruh DI DALAM scroll area.

+- [Feedback: PHP SSL cacert Windows](feedback_php_ssl_cacert_windows.md) ‚Äî cURL err 60 = PHP Windows tanpa CA bundle, BUKAN bug. Fix: cacert.pem + curl.cainfo/openssl.cafile di php.ini. Jangan matikan verify SSL.

+- [HowTo: Tes Manual Satu Sehat](howto_test_satusehat_manual.md) ‚Äî prosedur tes E2E Bridging Satu Sehat di UI sandbox: konfigurasi‚ÜíTest‚ÜíAktifkan, isi NIK dokter & KFA obat, kunjungan SELESAI, Sync Manual, verifikasi stat-card + log.

+- [Request Unit Notif & Pending](feature_request_unit_notif.md) ‚Äî RequestUnitView tab Pending (APPROVED); FarmasiView bell + polling 10s (Reverb off), diff snapshot status request/retur station=FARMASI.
+- [Stok Per-Lokasi](feature_stok_per_lokasi.md) ‚Äî inventory_stocks +kolom `location` (INVENTORI/BEDAH/FARMASI). Deliver = TRANSFER gudang‚Üíunit; konsumsi STRICT lokasi unit. Fix bug stok hilang.

+- [Request & Retur Unit ‚Äî UX & FEFO](feature_unit_request_retur.md) ‚Äî Tab Status terpisah Histori, batch/expiry auto-FEFO, generator MAX+1 retry 23505. Data Stock = InventoriStockSidebar kolom-3 (Opname + CSV stok). Admin 4 tab.

+- [Form Registry ‚Äî Fase 1-6 + v2](feature_form_registry.md) ‚Äî modul template form RM. Fase 1-6 + v2 gap-fix DONE 2026-05-30 (13 gap). SubmitRouter, validasi 422 per-field, Addendum, Audit Log, AggregateResolver, PDF parser, wizard, gzip. Gotcha: dev DB Postgres (no sqlite).

+- [TTD Dokumen View](feature_ttd_dokumen_view.md) ‚Äî antrian TTD dokter. Rencana revamp BELUM dieksekusi (split-view, multi-TTD capture ulang, warna `var(--ga)`, toast). Plan: plans/uinya-belum-bagus-...md.

+- [Master Jenis Dokumen RM](feature_document_type_master.md) ‚Äî UI CRUD `document_types` di /master-data/document-type. 4 endpoint (anti-circular + delete-guard 3 layer). Permission `form_template.read|write`.

+- [Rujukan (Internal & Eksternal)](feature_rujukan_internal_antar_poli.md) ‚Äî DokterView Tab 4 dua-mode: INTERNAL (visit-anak parent_visit_id, jadwal-aware) + EXTERNAL (BPJS‚ÜíVClaim insertRujukanKeluar). +Surat Kontrol BPJS otomatis saat finalisasi; Edit Surat Kontrol & Update SEP di modal Detail Admisi; badge sisi penerima. Sisa: cetak SEP A4, prefill Edit SEP, uji E2E BPJS. ‚öÝÔ∏è jangan tumpuk tool-call paralel.

+- [Logo Klinik / Kop Surat](feature_clinic_logo_kop_surat.md) ‚Äî Level 1: upload logo di Profil Klinik. BindingResolver auto-convert `*_path` ‚Üí absolute URL. Pakai `{{clinic_logo}}` bind ke `clinic.logo_path`. Level 2/3 ditunda.

+- [PENDING: Kategori Billing Mapping UI](project_kategori_billing_mapping_pending.md) ‚Äî ide user: master Kategori Tagihan jadi pusat + pemetaan via UI. 3 keputusan belum dijawab. Tanya ulang saat user balik.

+- [Bridging VClaim/Antrean](feature_bridging_vclaim.md) ‚Äî AUTHORITATIVE & LIVE. VCLAIM PRODUCTION LIVE 2026-05-30. Gotcha config: base_url WAJIB `https://`, kode_faskes `0038R137`, prod=vclaim-rest. SEP=ASLI. BpjsClient (HMAC+AES/LZString) + 41 route. UI /bridging. Permission `integrasi.*`.

+- [Asuransi Cover ‚Üí Kasir](feature_asuransi_cover_kasir.md) ‚Äî covered_amount di invoice+verif; full cover=konfirmasi (INSURANCE), partial=bayar selisih; tab "Sedang Dilayani"; endpoint confirm-coverage.

+- [Modul Asuransi/TPA Non-BPJS](feature_insurance_tpa.md) ‚Äî LIVE. 6 migration + AsuransiService/Controller (19 endpoint) + AsuransiView 3 tab. Auto-draft klaim setelah PAID jika VERIFIED. Tidak sentuh BPJS. +fix wait_minutes dari verifications.created_at.

+- [Penunjang View](feature_penunjang_view.md) ‚Äî revamp: filter kiri 2-baris, per-order workflow (Mulai/Input/Selesai), form Biometri OD/OS, upload attachment, global disable saat pending. Biometri kode BIOM.

+- [Penunjang Tarif Wiring](feature_penunjang_tarif_wiring.md) ‚Äî arsitektur FINAL procedure-based: penunjang = procedures kategori "Penunjang"; diagnostic_test_types jadi MIRROR via ProcedureObserver; billing resolve getPrice('procedure'). Tab Jenis Penunjang read-only. Card preview Tab 3 jangan push ke tindakanList (dobel-tagih).

+- [Jadwal Dokter v2](feature_jadwal_dokter_v2.md) ‚Äî per-minggu (`week_start` Senin via Carbon WIB), service_type BPJS/EKSEKUTIF, prefix `{poli_code}{room}`, 2 tab + Salin minggu + Import CSV. DONE build hijau. SISA: QueueService masih `D{room}`, perlu disambung ke poli_code.

+- [RBAC User Management](feature_rbac_user_management.md) ‚Äî DataPenggunaView CSV export/import pengguna, PIN TTD dokter (`users.pin` + POST /dokter/verify-pin, ganti hardcode 1234), reset password/PIN khusus superadmin (gate 403).

+- [General Consent di Admisi](feature_general_consent_admisi.md) ‚Äî GC di AdmisiView step 3 (pasien baru, TTD inline tanpa visit_id via renderForPreview). Fix: gzip‚Üíbytea Postgres invalid UTF8 (juga di finalize) + layout GC tanpa placeholder {{ttd_*}} (re-seed wajib).

+- [Feedback: sisip Form Registry murah/mahal](feedback_form_registry_sisip_murah_mahal.md) ‚Äî taruh form di tombol = MURAH (reuse FormDocsBrowser) KECUALI syarat "isi/TTD sebelum Visit ada" (mahal). Sebut pemicu biaya di awal.

+- [Bridging Satu Sehat](feature_bridging_satusehat.md) ‚Äî FHIR R4 Kemenkes. 4 resource statistik SEMUA TERKIRIM ke sandbox (Fase 1-6 SELESAI 2026-05-30) via FHIR transaction Bundle. +UI kfa_code & NIK dokter. Gotcha: Encounter wajib identifier+location+diagnosis, obat wajib Medication terpisah + UCUM valid, idempoten by-identifier. Sisa: operasional produksi. Plan: Docs/PLAN-BRIDGING-SATUSEHAT-ARUMED.md.

+- [Rekam Medis RME](feature_rekam_medis_rme.md) ‚Äî revamp master-detail. RmeAggregatorService 7 method + 8 endpoint `/pasien/{id}/{menu}`. Frontend kiri-menu/kanan-tabel + expand, addendum per-dokumen, audit drawer, cetak resume A4. Spec: docs/spec-rekam-medis-rme.md.

# Memory Index

- [Instance: Arumed-PrimaVision](project_instance_arumed_primavision.md) ‚Äî duplikat di `D:\Arumed-PrimaVision`, RS Mata Prima Vision Medan, tema biru, DB `dbprimavision`.
- [BUG: DoctorScheduleSeeder week_start](bug_doctorscheduleseeder_week_start.md) ‚Äî seed DB bersih gagal (week_start NOT NULL); fixed di clone, belum di master.

- [Arumed Project](project_arumed.md) ‚Äî Vue 3.5 + Laravel 13.8 HIS oftalmologi; status modul, pola wajib (skill, envelope, RBAC).
- [Nakes Profile (NIP/SIP/STR)](feature_nakes_profile_data_pengguna.md) ‚Äî input NIP/SIP/STR di modal user, `UserService::syncEmployeeProfile`. CSV sip/str belum.
- [PRE-GO-LIVE BUG AUDIT](project_pre_golive_bug_audit.md) ‚Äî Audit E2E 2026-05-29: 9 bug difix (branch `fix/pre-golive-500-bugs`, belum merge) + smoke 35/35 + BedahDemoSeeder.
- [Realtime Antrean (Reverb)](feature_realtime_antrean.md) ‚Äî Reverb disiapkan tapi belum aktif (`BROADCAST=log`); antrean polling 8s. Aktivasi = `.env` + `reverb:start`.
- [Master Data Stage 1+2](feature_master_data_stage1.md) ‚Äî Master Data kini: Profil/ICD-10/ICD-9/Wilayah. Procedures code autogen TND-001 per kategori.
- [Tarif & Paket Bedah](feature_tarif_paket_bedah.md) ‚Äî 3 section: Tarif Tindakan + Metode Bayar (insurer TPA + tarif per-insurer) + Paket Bedah. +CSV import/export paket.
- [Inventori Farmasi](feature_inventori_farmasi.md) ‚Äî modul standalone Obat/BHP/IOL/Alat Medis, permission `inventori_farmasi.*`. Master TANPA harga/stok.
- [Master CSV Pipeline](feature_master_csv_pipeline.md) ‚Äî pipeline generic CSV master (MasterDataService + REGISTRY). by-name vs uniqueKey. Validasi enum category obat/bhp belum.
- [Inventori ‚Äî Penentuan Harga](feature_inventori_harga.md) ‚Äî `inventory_prices` + `ppn_rate`. HJA = HPP √ó (1+margin%) √ó (PPN?). Recompute auto.
- [Pembelian & Penerimaan](feature_pembelian_penerimaan.md) ‚Äî Supplier/PO/GRN, stok per-batch+expiry, status PO auto dari GRN, HPP manual. +Cetak PO A4.
- [Anjungan Kiosk](feature_anjungan_kiosk.md) ‚Äî UMUM wired, BPJS disabled (tunggu client ID VClaim). Thermal print 80mm fixed.
- [Admisi View](feature_admisi_view.md) ‚Äî WilayahPicker + print thermal; stat cards per-penjamin; SOSIAL‚Üítarif; COB wired (split plafon placeholder).
- [Visit Active Guard + UI](feature_visit_active_guard.md) ‚Äî antrian difilter HARIAN; guard `registerVisit` tolak >1 visit aktif (422); badge active_visit. Belum ada auto-cleanup visit basi.
- [Perawat View](feature_perawat_view.md) ‚Äî 4 tab‚Üí1 card, validation TD+KGD+keluhan wajib. +CPPT timeline (`nurse_cppt_entries`, append+soft-edit).
- [Refraksionis View](feature_refraksionis_view.md) ‚Äî wire skipPt, payload lengkap, prefill, saveStep persist, filter "Umum & Asuransi", button-press tier-3.
- [Dokter Demo Seeder](feature_dokter_demo_seeder.md) ‚Äî `DokterDemoSeeder` (manual): pasien UMUM/BPJS/ASURANSI per dokter on-duty + kunjungan lama. Wajib visit.doctor_schedule_id.
- [DokterView Module](dokterview-module.md) ‚Äî SOAP Tab 4 auto-sync via watch; doFinalize cuma advance queue; tarif via [[kasir-getprice-resolve]]. +Form Registry pindah ke MODAL (FormDocsBrowser).
- [Flow Penunjang ‚Üî Dokter](flow_penunjang_dokter.md) ‚Äî DI_PENUNJANG (turun) vs SELESAI_PENUNJANG (naik), `requeueToDokter` reuse baris, order baru staging lokal.
- [KasirService::getPrice](kasir_getprice_resolve.md) ‚Äî sentral tariff resolver per insurer (procedure/medication/bhp/iol/equipment). TPA-aware. Rp 0/inactive = BPJS skip.
- [Billing Items Expansion](feature_billing_items_expansion.md) ‚Äî BHP loop fix, 4 kategori BHP tertutup, Medical Equipment flat usage fee per insurer. BPJS skip via Rp 0/inactive.
- [Bedah Terjadwal View](feature_bedah_terjadwal_view.md) ‚Äî `/bedah/terjadwal` 2 tab: Pasien Terjadwal (weekpicker + IOL) + Request (3-sumber). Pasien via `visits.surgery_schedule_id`.
- [Bedah View](feature_bedah_view.md) ‚Äî `/bedah/antrian` (panggil+selesai‚ÜíKASIR), polling 15s, badge PREOP. +Intraoperatif pemakaian BHP+Alat. +jam-bedah opsional.
- [Kasir View](feature_kasir_view.md) ‚Äî diskon flex (Rp/% per-item & global), cetak via Teleport. +Penunjang masuk invoice, master Kategori Tagihan, routing via advanceFromStation.
- [Flow PREOP_BEDAH](feature_preop_bedah.md) ‚Äî 3 entry-point (jadwal hari ini / hari lain auto-shift / tanpa jadwal). visit_type + surgery_schedule_id, tombol "Kirim ke Bedah".
- [Ruang OK Setting](feature_ruang_ok_setting.md) ‚Äî daftar Ruang OK di clinic_profiles.operating_rooms (JSON), diedit di Profil Klinik, dipakai BedahView.
- [Antrean TV](feature_antrean_tv.md) ‚Äî grid 8 stasiun, FIFO, 11 audio preset, Media backend-persisted. +Audio unlock overlay. Gotcha: room=nomor, poliklinik=nama.
- [Queue Advance Pattern](queue_advance_station_pattern.md) ‚Äî semua service station WAJIB delegasi ke `QueueService::advanceFromStation`. Sumber tunggal routing + broadcast TV.
- [Feedback: bertahap & konfirmasi](feedback_bertahap_konfirmasi.md) ‚Äî user prefer kerja per poin plan, tunggu konfirmasi, jangan eksekusi semua sekaligus.
- [Feedback: Vue underscore tag bug](feedback_vue_underscore_tag_bug.md) ‚Äî Vue 3.5 panic `<_Component>` + named slot. Workaround: alias import tanpa underscore.
- [Feedback: Vue literal mustache](feedback_vue_literal_mustache.md) ‚Äî `{{ '{{key}}' }}` di template ‚Üí route blank. WAJIB HTML entity atau `v-pre`.
- [Feedback: Vue v-show unmount bug](feedback_vue_vshow_unmount_bug.md) ‚Äî v-show + Transition + child ‚Üí freeze. Pakai v-if untuk wizard/tab dalam modal Transition.
- [Feedback: MasterFormModal gotcha](feedback_vue_vmodel_object_loop.md) ‚Äî v-model objek + deep watcher ‚Üí recursive update (guard JSON.stringify); field `*` merah; modal KFA z-index > 9000.
- [Feedback: photo_url di array patient](feedback_patient_photo_url_pick.md) ‚Äî formatter manual sering lupa `photo_url` ‚Üí avatar fallback inisial. Audit formatter sejenis.
- [Feedback: styling visibility](feedback_styling_visibility.md) ‚Äî `var(--pri)` polos sering invisible; pakai `#1763d4` + `color:#fff !important` + paksa text `#000`.
- [Feedback: timezone WIB](feedback_timezone_wib.md) ‚Äî backend timezone Asia/Jakarta bukan UTC; fix boundary reset harian penomoran antrean (config:clear wajib).
- [Feedback: print A4 blank](feedback_print_a4_basecss_reset.md) ‚Äî @media print WAJIB reset html/body min-width+height & `#app display:none`, kalau tidak struk blank.
- [Feedback: flex column scroll sibling](feedback_flex_column_scroll_sibling.md) ‚Äî jangan tambah section sibling ke scroll area di parent flex column. Taruh DI DALAM scroll area.
- [Feedback: PHP SSL cacert Windows](feedback_php_ssl_cacert_windows.md) ‚Äî cURL err 60 = PHP Windows tanpa CA bundle, BUKAN bug. Fix: cacert.pem + php.ini. Jangan matikan verify SSL.
- [HowTo: Tes Manual Satu Sehat](howto_test_satusehat_manual.md) ‚Äî prosedur tes E2E Bridging Satu Sehat di UI sandbox: konfigurasi‚ÜíTest‚ÜíAktifkan, isi NIK & KFA, Sync Manual, verifikasi.
- [Request Unit Notif & Pending](feature_request_unit_notif.md) ‚Äî RequestUnitView tab Pending (APPROVED); FarmasiView bell + polling 10s (Reverb off), diff snapshot status.
- [Stok Per-Lokasi](feature_stok_per_lokasi.md) ‚Äî inventory_stocks +kolom `location` (INVENTORI/BEDAH/FARMASI). Deliver = TRANSFER; konsumsi STRICT lokasi unit.
- [Request & Retur Unit ‚Äî UX & FEFO](feature_unit_request_retur.md) ‚Äî Tab Status terpisah Histori, batch/expiry auto-FEFO. Data Stock = InventoriStockSidebar (Opname + CSV stok).
- [Form Registry ‚Äî Fase 1-6 + v2](feature_form_registry.md) ‚Äî modul template form RM, Fase 1-6 + v2 gap-fix DONE. SubmitRouter, validasi 422, Addendum, PDF parser, gzip. Gotcha: dev DB Postgres.
- [TTD Dokumen View](feature_ttd_dokumen_view.md) ‚Äî antrian TTD dokter. Rencana revamp BELUM dieksekusi (split-view, multi-TTD capture ulang, toast).
- [Master Jenis Dokumen RM](feature_document_type_master.md) ‚Äî UI CRUD `document_types`. 4 endpoint (anti-circular + delete-guard 3 layer). Permission `form_template.read|write`.
- [Rujukan (Internal & Eksternal)](feature_rujukan_internal_antar_poli.md) ‚Äî DokterView Tab 4 dua-mode: INTERNAL (visit-anak) + EXTERNAL (BPJS‚ÜíVClaim). +Surat Kontrol BPJS otomatis, Update SEP di modal Admisi, badge penerima. Sisa: cetak SEP A4, uji E2E BPJS.
- [Logo Klinik / Kop Surat](feature_clinic_logo_kop_surat.md) ‚Äî Level 1: upload logo di Profil Klinik. Pakai `{{clinic_logo}}` bind ke `clinic.logo_path`. Level 2/3 ditunda.
- [PENDING: Kategori Billing Mapping UI](project_kategori_billing_mapping_pending.md) ‚Äî ide user: master Kategori Tagihan + pemetaan via UI. 3 keputusan belum dijawab. Tanya ulang saat user balik.
- [Bridging VClaim/Antrean](feature_bridging_vclaim.md) ‚Äî AUTHORITATIVE & LIVE production 2026-05-30. base_url WAJIB `https://`, kode_faskes `0038R137`. SEP=ASLI. Permission `integrasi.*`.
- [Asuransi Cover ‚Üí Kasir](feature_asuransi_cover_kasir.md) ‚Äî covered_amount; full cover=konfirmasi (INSURANCE), partial=bayar selisih; tab "Sedang Dilayani".
- [Modul Asuransi/TPA Non-BPJS](feature_insurance_tpa.md) ‚Äî LIVE. AsuransiService (19 endpoint) + AsuransiView 3 tab. Auto-draft klaim setelah PAID jika VERIFIED. Tidak sentuh BPJS.
- [Penunjang View](feature_penunjang_view.md) ‚Äî filter kiri 2-baris, per-order workflow (Mulai/Input/Selesai), form Biometri OD/OS, upload attachment. Biometri kode BIOM.
- [Penunjang Tarif Wiring](feature_penunjang_tarif_wiring.md) ‚Äî arsitektur FINAL procedure-based: penunjang = procedures "Penunjang"; billing resolve getPrice('procedure'). Card preview jangan push ke tindakanList (dobel-tagih).
- [Jadwal Dokter v2](feature_jadwal_dokter_v2.md) ‚Äî per-minggu (`week_start` Senin WIB), service_type BPJS/EKSEKUTIF, prefix `{poli_code}{room}`. SISA: QueueService masih `D{room}`, perlu disambung.
- [RBAC User Management](feature_rbac_user_management.md) ‚Äî CSV export/import pengguna, PIN TTD dokter (`users.pin` + verify-pin, ganti hardcode 1234), reset password/PIN khusus superadmin.
- [General Consent di Admisi](feature_general_consent_admisi.md) ‚Äî GC di AdmisiView step 3 (TTD inline tanpa visit_id). Fix: gzip‚Üíbytea Postgres invalid UTF8 + layout tanpa placeholder {{ttd_*}}.
- [Feedback: sisip Form Registry murah/mahal](feedback_form_registry_sisip_murah_mahal.md) ‚Äî form di tombol = MURAH (reuse FormDocsBrowser) KECUALI "isi/TTD sebelum Visit ada" (mahal).
- [Bridging Satu Sehat](feature_bridging_satusehat.md) ‚Äî FHIR R4 Kemenkes. 4 resource statistik terkirim ke sandbox (Fase 1-6 DONE) via transaction Bundle. Gotcha: Encounter wajib identifier+location+diagnosis, UCUM valid. Sisa: operasional produksi.
- [Rekam Medis RME](feature_rekam_medis_rme.md) ‚Äî revamp master-detail. RmeAggregatorService 7 method + 8 endpoint `/pasien/{id}/{menu}`. Frontend kiri-menu/kanan-tabel, addendum per-dokumen, cetak resume A4.

-- [Instance: Arumed-PrimaVision](project_instance_arumed_primavision.md) ‚Äî duplikat di `D:\Arumed-PrimaVision`, RS Mata Prima Vision Medan (RSKMPV), tema biru, DB `dbprimavision`/pw `arumed`.
-- [BUG: DoctorScheduleSeeder week_start](bug_doctorscheduleseeder_week_start.md) ‚Äî seed DB bersih gagal (week_start NOT NULL tak diisi); fixed di clone, belum di master.
+- [Instance: Arumed-PrimaVision](project_instance_arumed_primavision.md) ‚Äî duplikat di `D:\Arumed-PrimaVision`, RS Mata Prima Vision Medan, tema biru, DB `dbprimavision`.
+- [BUG: DoctorScheduleSeeder week_start](bug_doctorscheduleseeder_week_start.md) ‚Äî seed DB bersih gagal (week_start NOT NULL); fixed di clone, belum di master.
- [Arumed Project](project_arumed.md) ‚Äî Vue 3.5 + Laravel 13.8 HIS oftalmologi; status modul, pola wajib (skill, envelope, RBAC).
-- [Nakes Profile (NIP/SIP/STR)](feature_nakes_profile_data_pengguna.md) ‚Äî input NIP/SIP/STR di modal user (role nakes klinis), `UserService::syncEmployeeProfile`. CSV sip/str belum.

-- [PRE-GO-LIVE BUG AUDIT](project_pre_golive_bug_audit.md) ‚Äî Audit E2E 2026-05-29: 9 bug ditemukan & SEMUA difix (branch `fix/pre-golive-500-bugs`, belum merge) + smoke 35/35 + `BedahDemoSeeder`. Inti sehat. Test auth pakai curl.
-- [Realtime Antrean (Reverb)](feature_realtime_antrean.md) ‚Äî WS Reverb disiapkan tapi belum aktif (`BROADCAST=log`); antrean polling 8s. Aktivasi = isi `.env` + `reverb:start`.

-- [Master Data Stage 1+2](feature_master_data_stage1.md) ‚Äî Master Data kini: Profil/ICD-10/ICD-9/Wilayah (Tarif‚ÜíTarif&Paket, Obat/BHP/IOL‚ÜíInventori). Procedures code autogen TND-001 per kategori.

-- [Tarif & Paket Bedah](feature_tarif_paket_bedah.md) ‚Äî 3 section: Tarif Tindakan + Metode Bayar (insurer TPA parent/child + tarif per-insurer) + Paket Bedah. CSV by nama+kategori. +CSV import/export paket (long format).

-- [Inventori Farmasi](feature_inventori_farmasi.md) ‚Äî modul standalone Obat/BHP/IOL/Alat Medis di /inventori-farmasi/*, permission `inventori_farmasi.*`. Master TANPA harga/stok; harga di sub-menu Penentuan Harga.

-- [Master CSV Pipeline](feature_master_csv_pipeline.md) ‚Äî pipeline generic template/export/import CSV (MasterDataService + REGISTRY). Cara nambah resource, by-name vs uniqueKey. Audit besar 2026-05-30. Validasi enum category obat/bhp belum.
-- [Inventori ‚Äî Penentuan Harga](feature_inventori_harga.md) ‚Äî sub-menu /inventori-farmasi/harga. `inventory_prices` + `ppn_rate`. HJA = HPP √ó (1+margin%) √ó (PPN?). Recompute auto.
-- [Pembelian & Penerimaan](feature_pembelian_penerimaan.md) ‚Äî Supplier/PO/GRN, stok per-batch+expiry, status PO auto dari GRN. HPP manual. +Cetak PO A4 (e-sign pemohon + TTD basah direktur).
-- [Anjungan Kiosk](feature_anjungan_kiosk.md) ‚Äî UMUM wired, BPJS disabled (tunggu client ID VClaim). Heartbeat /up + envelope guard. Thermal print 80mm fixed (Teleport + @media print unscoped).

-- [Admisi View](feature_admisi_view.md) ‚Äî cleanup + WilayahPicker + print thermal; stat cards per-penjamin (invoice PAID); tgl lahir DD/MM/YYYY; SOSIAL‚Üítarif; COB wired (split plafon masih placeholder).

-- [Visit Active Guard + UI](feature_visit_active_guard.md) ‚Äî antrian difilter HARIAN; guard `registerVisit` tolak >1 visit aktif (422); badge/banner active_visit; filter "Belum Selesai (semua tgl)". Belum ada auto-cleanup visit basi.

-- [Perawat View](feature_perawat_view.md) ‚Äî 4 tab‚Üí1 card, validation TD+KGD+keluhan wajib. +CPPT timeline (`nurse_cppt_entries`, append+soft-edit). Bugfix pickPatient + action-row 3 v-if independen.

-- [Refraksionis View](feature_refraksionis_view.md) ‚Äî wire skipPt, payload lengkap (keratometri+kacamata lama+ADD+prescription), prefill, saveStep persist, filter "Umum & Asuransi", button-press tier-3.

-- [Dokter Demo Seeder](feature_dokter_demo_seeder.md) ‚Äî `DokterDemoSeeder` (manual): 3 pasien UMUM/BPJS/ASURANSI per dokter on-duty + 2 kunjungan lama finalized. Wajib visit.doctor_schedule_id; NIK+bpjs_number UNIQUE.

-- [DokterView Module](dokterview-module.md) ‚Äî SOAP Tab 4 auto-sync via watch; doFinalize cuma advance queue (Tab 2/4 tak persist); autosave 600ms; tarif via [[kasir-getprice-resolve]]. +Tab 4 Bedah jam opsional. +Form Registry pindah ke MODAL (FormDocsBrowser) + topbar identitas dokter.
-- [Flow Penunjang ‚Üî Dokter](flow_penunjang_dokter.md) ‚Äî DI_PENUNJANG (turun) vs SELESAI_PENUNJANG (naik), `requeueToDokter` reuse baris, 2 trigger, order baru staging lokal.

-- [KasirService::getPrice](kasir_getprice_resolve.md) ‚Äî sentral tariff resolver per insurer (procedure/medication/bhp/iol/equipment). TPA-aware via `Insurer::tariffInsurerId()`. Pattern Rp 0/inactive = BPJS skip.

-- [Billing Items Expansion](feature_billing_items_expansion.md) ‚Äî BHP loop fix di consolidateBilling, 4 kategori BHP tertutup, Medical Equipment flat usage fee per insurer. Forward-only. BPJS skip via Rp 0/inactive.

-- [Bedah Terjadwal View](feature_bedah_terjadwal_view.md) ‚Äî `/bedah/terjadwal` 2 tab: Pasien Terjadwal (weekpicker + IOL biometri) + Request (3-sumber, Terima/Retur). Request paket ‚Üí unit-request. Pasien via `visits.surgery_schedule_id`.

-- [Bedah View](feature_bedah_view.md) ‚Äî `/bedah/antrian` (panggil+selesai‚ÜíKASIR), polling 15s, badge PREOP. +Intraoperatif: pemakaian BHP + Alat Medis. +jam-bedah opsional (null‚Üí"belum diatur"). Ruang OK dari Profil Klinik.

-- [Kasir View](feature_kasir_view.md) ‚Äî revamp: kartu antrean + tier-3, diskon flex (Rp/% per-item & global), cetak via Teleport. +Penunjang masuk invoice, master Kategori Tagihan (`billing_categories`), consolidateBilling 7 builder, routing via advanceFromStation. BPJS normal.

-- [Flow PREOP_BEDAH](feature_preop_bedah.md) ‚Äî 3 entry-point (jadwal hari ini / hari lain auto-shift / tanpa jadwal). visit_type + surgery_schedule_id, audit log shift, skip auto-enqueue DOKTER, tombol "Kirim ke Bedah".
-- [Ruang OK Setting](feature_ruang_ok_setting.md) ‚Äî daftar Ruang OK di clinic_profiles.operating_rooms (JSON, default 3), diedit di Profil Klinik, dipakai BedahView.

-- [Antrean TV](feature_antrean_tv.md) ‚Äî grid 8 stasiun, FIFO, 11 audio preset, Media backend-persisted (sync via TvMediaUpdated). +Audio unlock overlay. Gotcha: doctor_schedules.room=nomor, poliklinik=nama.

-- [Queue Advance Pattern](queue_advance_station_pattern.md) ‚Äî semua service station WAJIB delegasi ke `QueueService::advanceFromStation`, jangan hardcode current_station/queue status. Sumber tunggal routing + broadcast TV.
